column1: # mapping_set_description: DPV `ai` extension <-> ISO/IEC 42001:2023 (AI Management Systems) term alignments. Hand-curated against the lmodel iso42001 LinkML schema (https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso42001/). Maps the DPV AI taxonomy (system classes, lifecycle stages, capabilities, risks, biases) to AIMS clauses. Primary high-leverage overlay for FINOS AI-governance use cases.
